It would also be better if she is teamed up with assassins who can hide in a bush where she’s also hiding and focus on the backline of the enemy’s team. It would be an easy 4v5 once that their target is dead since Hilda’s cc + Assassins damage is a very deadly combination

countered_by.name: Harley
countered_by.tip: Basically, Harley can counter Kagura because he can teleport then teleport back in his positions. Unlike Kagura that can only teleport once to her umbrella (because of the cooldown). But that does not mean Kagura cannot stand a chance against Harley. If Harley made his move first before Kagura, she will stagger and get low health before she can attack Harley. There are also cases that when Kagura threw her umbrella, Harley then used his 3rd Skill to Kagura, slowing her down and making her very vulnerable. Kagura can't use her 2nd Skill: Active 1 which is her jump that removes debuff when she doesn't have her umbrella. That's why be careful when fighting Harley.

counters.tip: Kagura can deal an amount of Killing damage to Layla as she has low defense, unless Layla has balanced offense and defense gear set. Kagura can fastly kill Layla when doing her combo. But if Layla survives, she will deal large damage to Kagura and lifesteal.

counters.name: Lesley
counters.tip: Mounted Leomord could deal handsome damage with his combo of spells. Combine the combo with passive effects and basic attacks afterwards, and he could put high pressure to vulnerable classes.

best_mate.name: Minotaur
best_mate.tip: Heroes with crowd-control work best with him as they could help create more room for Leomord to deal damage.

countered_by.name: Saber
countered_by.tip: Lesley is easily targeted by assassins, and Lolita’s ultimate can grant her a shield, while slowing and stunning Lesley.

counters.name: Odette
counters.tip: When Odette activates her ultimate skill, she becomes the perfect target for Lesley’s ultimate.

best_mate.name: Akai
best_mate.tip: Lesley’s damage output is high, but she lacks spacing abilities, and she is often rendered vulnerable to attack, especially when using her ultimate. She depends on teammates who can provide her with adequate protection, such as Lolita, with her shield, and Akai, with his knockback skill.

countered_by.name: Gord
countered_by.tip: Gord, Kimmy, Odette

countered_by.name: Kagura
countered_by.tip: Kagura is a really slippery mage with multiple escape abilities. If you stun her with skill 1, she can get away easily. Her ultimate and teleporting to umbrella can cancel your ultimate, cancelling your most powerful skill. The only way to not get your ultimate interrupted is to pay attention to her skill usage. Make sure she have used both her umbrella teleport and dash, so she have no chance to cancel or escape your ultimate.

counters.name: Cyclops
counters.tip: You can block each and every single attack so he is generally not a huge threat.

best_mate.name: Roger
best_mate.tip: Laning with him is really good because you both have crowd control and damage to kill anyone.

countered_by.name: Martis
countered_by.tip: Lunox could only protect herself for a short moment. Stable damage dealer with ability to blink are great threats to her.

counters.name: Lancelot
counters.tip: Power of Chaos: Brilliance makes Lunox less fearful of assassins. He could deal with assassins’ counters quite well.

best_mate.name: Franco
best_mate.tip: Heroes with control skill are good partners for Lunox

countered_by.name: Hayabusa
countered_by.tip: Miya is very squishy, and without the aid of support heroes, is susceptible to assassins.

counters.name: Hylos
counters.tip: Miya’s damage is very high, so tanks who lack high damage will find it difficult to deal with her in the late game.

best_mate.name: Lolita
best_mate.tip: Miya is very fragile and requires the protection of her teammates to reach her full damage potential. Lolita can help her to achieve this.

countered_by.name: Natalia
countered_by.tip: The Silence and her damage could shred you before you can even do anything.

counters.name: Fanny
counters.tip: With so many Fanny roaming around, your “2” would come in handy in disabling her

best_mate.name: Aurora
best_mate.tip: Mages like Aurora, Due to her High damage kit, pairing her up with Nana would allow her to easily land her skills and making those 2 a pretty annoying combo to lane against.

countered_by.name: Yi Sun-shin
countered_by.tip: Yi Sun-Shin's Ultimate Skill can notify Natalia’s whereabouts, not only eliminating her Invisibility at crucial times in Team Fight, but also continuously informing her teammates about Natalia's presence, so that the entire team gets information about the paths that are passed by Natalia.

counters.name: Clint
counters.tip: Generally, Marksman is Natalia's main food, except for Miya who has the Ultimate Skill which works like Purify to neutralize the effects of Silence from Natalia. Likewise with Irithel who has an AoE Skill and a Basic Attack that will become AoE when the Ultimate Skill is active, this will easily show where Natalia is hiding.

best_mate.name: Saber
best_mate.tip: Saber and Chou can cause a Stun effect on the target or Cyclops which can lock the target to stay in position, then continue with Silencing for 2 seconds from Natalia, resulting in a deadly combo to hunt down opponents who don't suspect our presence.

countered_by.name: Aurora
countered_by.tip: Aurora can stop your Ultimate Skill remotely using its freezing Ultimate.

counters.name: Cyclops
counters.tip: Odette can't actually counter opponents, but she can fight a Hero who doesn't have Stun Skills and without high mobility.

best_mate.name: Grock
best_mate.tip: Thanks to Grock’s wall, it can stop opponents from escaping from your Ultimate Skill.

countered_by.tip: His ultimate's slowdown may put Rafaela's into a dangerous situation and can easily kill her with the right combos.

counters.name: Natalia
counters.tip: Rafaela's Holy of Retribution can easily force Natalia out of her invisible mode so she can't attacks teammates from behind.

best_mate.name: Miya
best_mate.tip: Both are pretty slow and squishy, but if they use their passives correctly, may be a deadly duo. Miya's passive make her basic attacks faster while Rafaela's passive can catch up a enemies easily for Miya to finish off.

countered_by.name: Saber
countered_by.tip: Roger can be killed quite easily when under control effects.

counters.name: Hayabusa
counters.tip: If this kind of burst hero can’t take Roger down quickly, Roger’s fast attack speed and lifesteal can make short work of them.

best_mate.name: Rafaela
best_mate.tip: Roger deals high damage alone, and the control and acceleration skills of these teammates can help him deal even more.

countered_by.name: Chou
countered_by.tip: His 2nd skill makes him immune to CC and may be a problem if you want to stun him before he stuns and ults you.

counters.name: Tigreal
counters.tip: You can cancel his 3rd skill with your 2nd skill or Ult (Gets canceled with any stun). Also, you can interrupt his 2nd skill when he finishes the first charge with your 2nd skill and jump away

best_mate.name: Lapu-Lapu
best_mate.tip: Ruby ults and stuns, while Lapu ults and bursts.

countered_by.name: Saber
countered_by.tip: Saber's ultimate is a very strong CC. Once Selena is surrounded by enemies and becomes targeted by Saber, it won't be easy for Selena to flee.

counters.name: Layla
counters.tip: Layla doesn't have blink skills, so once hit by Selena's Abyssal Arrow, it won't be easy for Layla to flee.

best_mate.name: Kaja
best_mate.tip: His ultimate controls the enemy for Selena. He can also use his 2nd to protect her.

countered_by.name: Minotaur
countered_by.tip: Both physical attack immunity and forced displacement pose a very high threat to thamuz

counters.name: Miya
counters.tip: The lack of displacement of the continuous damage heroes in the face of thamuz's pursuit of lack of response.

best_mate.name: Angela
best_mate.tip: Both group control and immune control can greatly enhance their characteristics.

countered_by.name: Eudora
countered_by.tip: It is obvious why she is here, she has a stun that lasts enough to let the enemy team lower your hp faster if you don't take care, Tigreal is pretty hard, but not inmortal like Argus with his Ulti. Keep an eye on it.

counters.name: Miya
counters.tip: The only mobility Miya has is her Ultimate, and it has a big cooldown, making Tigreal able to reach her while escaping by using Flicker and 2nd ability, and even only his 2nd would be enough.

best_mate.name: Gord
best_mate.tip: Tigreal put all the enemies together with his skill combination and gord with his stun and ultimate kills them all while Tigreal has all of them stunned. The most of the times my friend gets Triple Kill/Maniac and even once he reached Savage by doing this combo. A nice team.

countered_by.name: Karina
countered_by.tip: Because Valir lacks life-saving skills, it's hard for him to handle assassins with multi-stage dash skills.

counters.name: Pharsa
counters.tip: Valir's Searing Torrent can completely restrain Pharsa's Feathered Air Strike, preventing her from maintaining sustained damage.

best_mate.name: Aurora
best_mate.tip: With Aurora using Coldness Destroy to freeze enemies, Valir can maximize his damage output.

countered_by.name: Lancelot
countered_by.tip: Lancelot has a very high mobility. With its skills and his ultimate, Lancelot can quickly dash over the enemy or run away from them. In this way, Lancelot counters Vexana because his skills deal alot of damage in just a single skill.  Lancelot's Thorned Rose counters Vexana in a way such that he is invulnerable for a very short time, tendency, Vexana's skills will miss and will not do much damage.

counters.name: Odette
counters.tip: Odette's ultimate takes time to deal more damage. But with Vexana's Charmed Scepter, her ultimate can be cancelled quickly. In this way, Odette is now useless and will rely on her abilities.

best_mate.name: Tigreal
best_mate.tip: He is one of the best clash initiators in the game. He has hard crowd control and take enemies wherever direction he wants.
